titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Abbas Ibn Hilal
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Abbas Ibn Hilal

segments: ه عن العبّاس بن هلال فقد رويته عن الحسين بن إبراهيم بن ناتانة- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن العبّاس بن هلال‌.
arabic.text: ه عن العبّاس بن هلال فقد رويته عن الحسين بن إبراهيم بن ناتانة- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن العبّاس بن هلال‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Abbas ibn Hilal has been transmitted by me from Al-Husayn ibn Ibrahim ibn Natanah - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Al-Abbas ibn Hilal.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Abbas ibn Hilal has been transmitted by me from Al-Husayn ibn Ibrahim ibn Natanah - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Al-Abbas ibn Hilal.
